reason: Verify all AC1-AC16 pass; DoD items (tsc, cargo check, cargo test, lint) executed; out-of-scope items not silently added; ADR decisions honored (allowTransparency always on, WebglAddon kept, asset scope locked to backgrounds/**).

Validate xterm config: allowTransparency=true is set at construction; theme.background uses rgba/8-hex when bg enabled; WebglAddon still loads without GL errors; selection/cursor visible against translucent bg.

Validate Tauri config: tauri-plugin-fs is direct Cargo dep; init() called in lib.rs; assetProtocol.scope.allow EXACTLY = ["$APPLOCALDATA/backgrounds/**"] (no broader scope); cargo check passes after capability change.

Check end-to-end data flow consistency: relative path stored in settings vs absolute path used in convertFileSrc; sessionId-keyed override map in terminalStore; cleanup of orphaned files in appLocalData/backgrounds/ matches settings.imagePath.
Enforce project frontend quality bar on new code (even if file is a placeholder, the act of reading it primes the reviewer to flag missing conventions).
Verify new TerminalBackgroundSettings interface is strictly typed, no `any`; settingsStore migration handles missing/invalid fields; backend ↔ frontend command payloads have explicit types.
